description: The clip shows an overhead view of a person slicing multiple ripe red tomatoes and then tearing and chopping fresh green romaine lettuce on a wooden cutting board next to a kitchen sink, with clear knife sounds.
A person whisks dry ingredients, then an egg into cream, before unwrapping two fresh blue crabs and patting them dry on a plate in preparation for cooking.
Two battered soft-shell crabs sizzle and bubble as they deep-fry in a pot of hot oil, turning golden brown and creating satisfying ASMR sounds.
Two battered soft-shell crabs are vigorously deep-frying in a pot of golden hot oil, creating satisfying bubbling and sizzling sounds.

A person prepares soft-shell crabs by first dipping them in an egg wash mixture (heavy cream and egg) and then thoroughly coating them in a seasoned flour mixture (flour, paprika, potato starch, salt, pepper), before placing two fully coated crabs on a plate.
A person deep-fries two flour-dusted soft-shell crabs in a pot of hot oil on a stovetop, dropping them in for an immediate sizzle and flipping them with tongs to achieve golden-brown crispiness.
